title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何将现代都市街头美学与日本视觉文化相结合，创造出既时尚又具有强烈视觉冲击力的海报设计。它适合用于中文市场中追求潮流、年轻化的品牌宣传，尤其是在强调个性和创新的营销场景中。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了如何将现代都市街头美学与日本视觉文化相结合，创造出既时尚又具有强烈视觉冲击力的海报设计。它适合用于中文市场中追求潮流、年轻化的品牌宣传，尤其是在强调个性和创新的营销场景中。
prompt_original: Design a high-detail portrait poster in a bold Japanese graffiti-inspired art style that fuses modern urban street aesthetics with expressive Japanese visual culture. Pack the poster with dynamic graffiti typography, layered spray-paint textures, hand-drawn motifs, abstract paint splashes, neon brush strokes, urban sticker elements, Japanese calligraphy accents, and decorative ornaments that amplify the energetic mood. Keep the overall composition artistic, rebellious, fashionable, and visually striking, yet still polished to premium editorial poster quality, never messy or overdone. The subject should NOT copy the exact pose or expression from any reference image. Instead, invent an entirely new pose that feels natural, confident, and alive. The expression should read as emotionally expressive, charismatic, and engaging, never stiff, awkward, flat, or blank. The pose should carry the elegance and sophistication of an international fashion model, with stylish posture, natural movement, and a subtle attitude that elevates the cinematic fashion vibe. The outfit must be contemporary, stylish, casual fashion with strong visual appeal. Skip plain or repetitive clothing. Lean into fashionable layering, modern streetwear inspiration, premium casual styling, and a balanced mix of colors, patterns, textures, and fabrics for a rich, non-monotonous look. The clothing should feel trendy, fashionable, youthful, and visually premium, while still belonging inside the Japanese graffiti poster concept. Fill the background and poster decorations with thematic urban Japanese-inspired elements: graffiti walls, spray textures, painted symbols, urban signage, layered stickers, modern Japanese graphic motifs, abstract shapes, paint drips, street fashion aesthetics, and stylish decorative compositions that deepen the artistic intensity without distracting from the subject. Lighting should feel cinematic and fashionable, with strong contrast, clean highlights, realistic skin texture, and high-end editorial poster quality. The final result must look like a premium modern street-fashion campaign poster, with highly detailed textures, balanced composition, vibrant color harmony, realistic proportions, ultra-sharp focus, and immersive visual storytelling. Ultra-detailed, highly aesthetic, premium composition, realistic texture rendering, fashionable urban atmosphere, cinematic quality, poster-ready design, 8K ultra high resolution. #AIart #GPTImage2
prompt_zh: 设计一幅高细节的肖像海报，采用大胆的日式涂鸦艺术风格，融合现代都市街头美学和富有表现力的日本视觉文化。海报应充满动态的涂鸦字体、层层叠叠的喷漆纹理、手绘图案、抽象的油漆飞溅、霓虹笔触、城市贴纸元素、日式书法点缀以及增强活力氛围的装饰性元素。整体构图要保持艺术性、叛逆性、时尚性和视觉冲击力，同时保持高端编辑海报的精致度，避免杂乱或过度。主题人物不应复制任何参考图像中的确切姿势或表情。相反，应创造一个全新的、自然、自信且生动的姿势。表情应显得情感丰富、有魅力且引人注目，绝不能僵硬、尴尬、平淡或空白。姿势应具备国际时尚模特的优雅和气质，姿态时尚、动作自然，并带有一种微妙的态度，提升电影般的时尚感。服装必须是当代、时尚、休闲的，具有强烈的视觉吸引力。避免单调或重复的服装。倾向于时尚的层次搭配、现代街头服饰灵感、高端休闲风格，以及颜色、图案、纹理和面料的平衡组合，以实现丰富而不单调的外观。服装应感觉时尚、年轻且视觉上高端，同时符合日式涂鸦海报的概念。背景和海报装饰应充满主题性的城市日本元素：涂鸦墙、喷漆纹理、绘制符号、城市标志、层叠贴纸、现代日本图形图案、抽象形状、油漆滴落、街头时尚美学以及加深艺术强度但不分散主题注意力的时尚装饰组合。灯光应具有电影感和时尚感，具有强烈的对比度、干净的高光、真实的皮肤质感和高端编辑海报的质量。最终效果必须看起来像是一张高端现代街头时尚活动海报，具有高度详细的纹理、平衡的构图、鲜艳的色彩和谐、逼真的比例、超清晰的焦点和沉浸式的视觉叙事。超高细节、高度美学、高端构图、逼真的纹理渲染、时尚的城市氛围、电影级质量、适合海报的设计、8K超高清分辨率。
